sellers_note: Introducing the 2022 Tesla Model 3 Long Range, a marvel of modern engineering that perfectly marries luxury, innovation, and sustainability. This stunning vehicle is not just a car; it's an experience that redefines what it means to drive. Dressed in an elegant silver exterior, the Model 3 exudes sophistication and style, turning heads wherever you go. Step inside, and you're greeted by a pristine white leather interior that offers a sanctuary of comfort and class, elevating every journey to a first-class experience. Under the hood, you'll find the heart of this electric powerhouse: a robust 346 horsepower engine delivering 389 ft. lbs. of torque. With its 1-Speed Direct-Drive Automatic transmission, the Model 3 offers seamless acceleration that will leave you breathless. Feel the thrill of going from 0 to 60 in mere seconds, all while enjoying the whisper-quiet serenity of an electric motor. With an impressive range of 334 miles per charge, this vehicle is perfect for both daily commutes and long-distance adventures, ensuring you spend more time on the road and less time at the charging station. Tesla's commitment to safety and cutting-edge technology is evident in every feature. The Enhanced Autopilot and Full Self-Driving Capability transform your driving experience, offering unparalleled convenience and peace of mind. Whether you're navigating through city streets or cruising down the highway, the adaptive stop-and-go cruise control and lane-keeping assist work harmoniously to keep you safe and centered. The automatic emergency braking and pre-collision warning systems provide an extra layer of security, alerting you to potential hazards before they become a problem. The 2022 Model 3's panoramic moonroof invites the outside world in, flooding the cabin with natural light and offering breathtaking views of the sky above. The aluminum alloy wheels not only enhance the vehicle's sleek profile but also ensure a smooth and stable ride. With a 15-inch infotainment screen at your fingertips, you have access to a world of entertainment and navigation options, all designed to keep you connected and informed on the go. Tesla's innovative spirit extends to the details, such as the NACS (SAE J3400) electric motor charger connector, making recharging both quick and convenient. The multi-function remote with proximity entry system ensures that you're always ready to hit the road with ease, while the driver attention alert system keeps you focused and alert. The
